roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S NON-OPP DEFT'S MOT SET ASIDE GUILTY PLEA & VACATE CONVICTION FILED
DEF MOTION TO W/D GUILTY PLEA,MEMO OF P&A FILED

/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/INTC/TN: MARSIO RAMON MEJIA ROSA/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 08-17-94 IS VACATED//CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA TO A  VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11351, ENTERED 03-17-94, IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT  GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 2, A MISDEMEANOR VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 32,/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:02/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 D:PJ1D/CTS:1/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/CTORD: PAY $300 ICNA/CTORD: PAY $50 COURT SECURITY FEE/CTORD: COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES IS PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED/OBEY/ACCEP/NUNCDAT: 03-17-94/DISM3/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/
/CAL MOTION TO EXTEND PROBATION/MO GRTD//PROB EXT 04-14-98/
SP3Y(M)-ESS/PJ1Y/CTS34D/NOT/DEFT REL TO INS & NOT TO ENTER USA ILLEGALLYDEFT ADV/WVD RTS;CRT ORD PROB MOD W/SAME T/C
SPN INT SW-MIRANDA/V;DEFT STIP VIOL PROB & WVD PR 2900,5PC ALL PURPOSES
PD APPTD;SPN INT SW-A/CASTANEDA;REF APD S/R TO BE FILED 8/15/94;REMANDEDTRANSF TO D23 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 9AM 8/17/94
CERT TO SUP CT, SEE DOCKET FOR PROPOSED SENTENCE
